name: the short signal aks does not match inside the word leaks so Azure/K8s do not misfire on it
command: T=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "prevent content leaks and data leaks" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts (JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["workload_types"]).join(",")'); echo "$T" | grep -qvE 'azure-platform|container-orchestration' && ! echo "$T" | grep -qE 'azure-platform|container-orchestration' && echo aks-not-in-leaks 1>&2
